# hetzner-robot_ip (Data Source)

Reads an IP address's details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up details of an IP address.
data "hetzner-robot_ip" "node" {
  ip = "1.2.3.4"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `locked` (Boolean)
- `separate_mac` (String)
- `server_ip` (String)
- `server_number` (Number)
- `traffic_daily` (Number)
- `traffic_hourly` (Number)
- `traffic_monthly` (Number)
- `traffic_warnings` (Boolean)
